videos.title: Claude Fable 5 Is Back — But It Came Back Different? (Full Breakdown)
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Fable 5 Is Back — But It Came Back Different? (Full Breakdown) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
The U.S. government switched off the most powerful publicly available AI model — and three weeks later, it came back changed. In this video, I break down the full Claude Fable 5 / Mythos 5 saga: the June 9 launch, the Amazon jailbreak that triggered an export control order from Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, the standoff between Anthropic and the Trump administration, the staged resolution, and why the July 1 comeback isn't as clean as the press release suggests.
We'll cover the two very different stories Anthropic and the White House are telling, the IPO pressure behind the scenes, the Chinese models that closed the gap during the blackout, and what this precedent means for anyone building on top of a closed frontier model.

⏱️ CHAPTERS

03:54 – So What Actually Triggered This?

08:51 – How It Actually Got Resolved

90% of Golfers Have NEVER Tried This Ball Striking Fix ⬇️⬇️ry Swing Coach for FREE ⬇️⬇️

📱 SwingCoach - https://inf.getswingcoach.com/CHRY232

Struggling to strike your irons consistently? You're not alone.

In this live golf lesson, Tom arrived battling poor iron contact, inconsistent strikes and a lack of confidence. Rather than making huge swing changes, we focused on a few key areas that transformed his ball striking in a surprisingly short space of time.

In this lesson you'll learn:

The simple setup change that improved his strike.
How a better body pivot creates more consistent contact.
Why controlling the club correctly through the swing matters more than most golfers realise.
The unique ball striking drill that produced almost instant results – and one that most golfers have probably never seen before.

If you've been trying endless swing tips but still struggle to compress your irons consistently, this lesson could completely change the way you think about ball striking.

Let me know in the comments which part of the lesson surprised you the most, and if you'd like to see more real, on-course coaching sessions like this.

videos.summary_source_text:
Varför bygger VW och Audi bättre elbilar i Kina? Volkswagen och Audi säger sig bygga framtidens elbilar – men de mest intressanta modellerna verkar inte hamna här. 
I Kina rullar elbilar med snabbare utvecklingstakt, vassare mjukvara, längre räckvidd och mer avancerad teknik än det vi får köpa i Europa.

Så varför bygger de tyska jättarna sina mest konkurrenskraftiga elbilar på andra sidan jorden? Handlar det om kinesiska krav, europeisk tröghet – eller om att VW och Audi helt enkelt har tappat greppet om sin hemmamarknad?
I veckans avsnitt pratar vi om varför Kina-versionerna av Volkswagens och Audis elbilar får Europa-modellerna att kännas gamla redan vid lansering.

videos.title: The Helicopter Drill for a Neutral Swing Plane
videos.summary_source_text:
The Helicopter Drill for a Neutral Swing Plane Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. Stuck slicing your driver or fighting an out-of-plane swing? This drill fixes both in 5 minutes a day.

In this video I break down the Helicopter Drill — a simple, repeatable move that gets your arms, shoulders, and forearms matched to the correct swing plane. You'll learn exactly how to stay in your posture through impact, rotate your hands correctly on the way back and through, and release the club like the pros so your driver flies dead straight instead of leaking right or hooking left.

After watching, you'll be able to feel the difference between staying "stuck" in posture too long and standing up too early, know exactly how your forearms should work through impact, and take this feeling straight into full-speed swings with your driver.

I use the Blue Brick to train this feeling — it's the easiest way to groove the correct arm and shoulder angles without overthinking your swing.

videos.title: Claude Fable 5 Is BACK (And It's Different)
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Fable 5 Is BACK (And It's Different) Join the community here 🙌 https://mrc.fm/cmc

After nearly three weeks offline Claude Fable 5 is finally back and I get into everything that changed while it was gone. I show you exactly where Fable 5 lives now (Claude.ai, Claude Code, Claude Cowork and the API), the new usage limits running through July 7, why some of your coding prompts are quietly getting rerouted to Opus 4.8, and whether Fable 5 still deserves its best coding model in the world crown after everything. If you build with AI agents, vibe code, or run Claude Code daily, this is the update you've been waiting for.

videos.title: Hit From The Inside Every Time With Driver and Irons
videos.summary_source_text:
Hit From The Inside Every Time With Driver and Irons Are you being lied to by golf coaches on social media just to feed an algorithm? In this video, we break down what might be golf’s biggest con: the classic "headcover under the lead arm" connection drill. While lazy pros love posting it for views, forcing yourself to stay tightly connected actually destroys your width, ruins your arm lift, and creates massive club path issues. It's a major reason why so many amateurs struggle to strike their irons or hit a consistent driver.

Instead of chasing bad advice, I'm showing you how to actually fix it using my "Drop and Rotate" method. You'll learn how to get the correct reach on the backswing (yes, the headcover should fall out!) and how to properly drop the arms into place before you rotate to the ball—a feel you've probably seen top pros like Justin Rose practicing.

We cover exactly how to apply this to master your iron play and how to hit your driver better, longer, and straighter without that unnatural, cramped swing. Drop a comment below if you've been burned by this tip, and stop letting fake coaching ruin your game!

videos.title: Ansökan till Sveriges Mästerkock
videos.summary_source_text:
Ansökan till Sveriges Mästerkock Kamerakvinnan söker ännu en gång till Sveriges Mästerkock med sin paradrätt och visar här hur den skall tillagas. 

Recept på bästa skaldjurspastan:
250-500 gram färsk pasta
2 purjolökar
6 klyftor pressad vitlök
2 citroner - både zest och saft
2 msk Sambal oelek
1 fiskbuljong
2,5 dl vispgrädde
2,5 dl creme fraishe
minst 2,5 dl mjölk
1 dl vitt vin
15 cocktailtomater
1 liten burk kräftstjärtar i lake
1 liten burk räkor i lake
några nävar färsk bladspenat
1 mozzarella
salt och svartpeppar
olivolja att steka i

Over 90% of high blood pressure cases are classified as idiopathic or essential hypertension, meaning the cause is considered unknown.

• Magnesium
• Potassium

The body needs about 4700 mg of potassium per day, and magnesium needs are often much higher than the standard 400 mg recommendation.

videos.title: I got rid of my M5 for THIS!
videos.summary_source_text:
I got rid of my M5 for THIS! Mat's speccing a brand new Audi RS5 where he chooses the body type, trim level, colour, and other customisable options and features. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-02-07

Mat’s getting an all-new car! 

His BMW M5 Touring has been returned, and he’s chosen his next car - a brand new Audi RS5! And as it’s a brand new car, he’s paid Audi a visit to spec it! 

When it comes to speccing a car such as this, there are so many options to choose from. First up he needs to decide whether he’ll go for the saloon or the estate. He was recently running an estate with his BMW M5, so will he decide to switch it up this time around? 

After that, he can choose between the different trim levels and the different features that come with them - Standard, Carbon Black, or Vorsprung (no prizes for guessing which he chose…). But following that comes the big choice - the colour! While the likes of Daytona Grey and Red are some of the most popular colours out there, he’s also going to look into some of the most exclusive (and expensive!) colours on offer! 

Finally, it will be down to choosing the wheels and brake types, as well as some additional options such as a tow bar! 

The question is, how much do you think his fully-specced RS5 will cost? And following that, do you think it’s worth it?! Stick with Mat to see for yourself! Mat's speccing a brand new Audi RS5 where he chooses the body type, trim level, colour, and other customisable options and features.

The DLLS Stars crew breaks down the reported trade that would have sent Thomas Harley to the Blue Jackets in exchange for Werenski, exploring why the veteran defenseman declined the move and what it says about both organizations. The crew discusses Dallas' interest in adding a No. 1 defenseman, why Columbus was willing to listen, and how Werenski's decision impacts the Stars' offseason plans. If your hips keep sliding to the right in the backswing, the fix isn't in your hips — it's in your upper body and sternum. This video breaks down exactly what you need to change.

You'll learn the bump-turn, bump-turn sequence that gives you a proper weight shift, less moving parts, and far more consistency off the tee. Practice it at home in minutes a day.

The Ball First Board is the training aid that teaches this feel directly — pushing the right pedal into the ground, staying off the back stick, and loading into the lead side before you unwind.

videos.title: If You Eat Before Bed, You Need To Watch This Video (WARNING)
videos.summary_source_text:
If You Eat Before Bed, You Need To Watch This Video (WARNING) Discover why you should stop eating before bed for better sleep, digestion, blood sugar, and gut health. Stop eating 3 hours before bed to maximize these benefits.

0:00 No eating before bed
0:24 Growth hormone and sleep quality 
1:36 Insulin and growth hormone 
2:49 More growth hormone benefits 
3:35 The importance of deep sleep
4:35 Fasting and growth hormone
5:33 Melatonin for better sleep 
6:05 Snacking
6:48 Should you eat before bed? 
8:46 The best time to stop eating

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4eGSzKR

Discover more healthy habits that can improve your sleep, metabolism, and overall health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/JhRqDqbyJ9o 
▶️ https://youtu.be/FAuClbdfqrI
▶️ https://youtu.be/CvBR-GoBvzk

Make your last meal count with these 6 foods that can help you sleep: https://drbrg.co/4fcNr18

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Should you eat before bed? Growth hormone naturally spikes during the first 90 minutes of sleep, but eating before bed may suppress this important hormone. Growth hormone plays a key role in fat burning, muscle growth, collagen production, bone health, recovery, healthy immune function, and brain health.

Most of your body’s repair and recovery occurs while you sleep. For better sleep quality and beauty sleep, avoid foods that significantly raise insulin before bedtime. Sugar and starches trigger the greatest insulin response, while protein and vegetables have a much smaller effect.

Sleep quality affects everything from cognitive function to food cravings the next day. Melatonin, the hormone that helps you fall asleep, is also influenced by your eating habits. 

For better sleep, digestion, blood sugar, and gut health, stop eating 3 hours before bed. Make your last meal nutrient-dense with adequate protein, healthy fats, and sea salt to help keep you satisfied throughout the night.

DATA: 
https://actaps.sinh.ac.cn/qikan/manage/wenzhang/2017-5-09.pdf

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: ALL IS QUIET! Carolina Hurricanes Staying Pat on Day 1 of NHL Free Agency
videos.summary_source_text:
ALL IS QUIET! Carolina Hurricanes Staying Pat on Day 1 of NHL Free Agency After the first day of the NHL Free Agency, the Carolina Hurricanes remained relatively quiet when it came to moves. The defending Stanley Cup champions have 98% of their roster signed through next season, so it makes sense why they won't make many moves on Day 1. That said, what stood out? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes stayed quiet on Day 1 of free agency. While there was some noise around John Carlson and Alexander Nikishin, nothing came on that front. Furthermore, the Hurricanes don't need to make moves as of right now, with them having most of their Stanley Cup team signed in 2026-27. Secondly, the Hurricanes do see Domenick Fensore and Ryan Suzuki move on to other teams after spending some time within the organization. Where did they go, and how much did they receive from their new teams? What does it mean for the Hurricanes? Finally, Zach shares his overall thoughts about Day 1 of free agency, which saw some crazy signings and trades. What stood out the most, and why is it not surprising to see a lot of trades, along with free agent signings? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 01.07.26 - Ep 16 - The Tokenization Era: How Real-World Assets Are Moving On-Chain
videos.summary_source_text:
01.07.26 - Ep 16 - The Tokenization Era: How Real-World Assets Are Moving On-Chain Welcome to Episode 16 of the RIFT Before You Quit series.

In this episode, we explore one of the biggest transformations taking place in global finance: the Tokenization Era.

While cryptocurrency introduced the world to digital assets, tokenization represents something even bigger—the ability to bring ownership of real-world assets onto blockchain infrastructure. From real estate and government bonds to private equity, commodities, and infrastructure projects, tokenization has the potential to reshape how capital moves and how investors participate in financial markets.

Throughout this session, we examine why institutions are investing heavily in tokenization, how programmable ownership works, and why this technological shift could dramatically expand access to investment opportunities that were previously reserved for large institutions and high-net-worth investors.

You'll also discover how these developments align with RIFT's long-term vision of creating intelligent financial infrastructure that combines smart money strategies, AI-powered allocation, non-custodial participation, and future-ready investment ecosystems.

Whether you're new to blockchain or already familiar with digital assets, this episode provides valuable insight into why many industry leaders believe tokenization will become one of the defining trends of the next decade.

In this episode, you'll learn:

✅ What tokenization actually means
✅ How real-world assets are being brought onto blockchain networks
✅ Why real estate, bonds, and private equity remain difficult for most retail investors to access today
✅ How fractional ownership can make global investments more accessible
✅ Why major financial institutions are embracing tokenized assets
✅ The advantages of programmable ownership and 24/7 markets
✅ How tokenization may improve liquidity and market accessibility
✅ The relationship between tokenization, AI, and smart money allocation
✅ How intelligent infrastructure could transform investing over the coming decade
✅ Why RIFT is building for the future of digital financial participation

As discussed throughout the Before You Quit series, the future of finance isn't simply about trading digital assets—it is about creating smarter infrastructure for participation.

This episode expands on previous discussions covering:

Smart Money
Self-Custody
AI-Driven Finance
Copy Trading
Automated Capital Systems
High-Frequency Trading
Financial Infrastructure
Risk Management
Institutional Investing
The Future of Digital Markets

Tokenization has the potential to change how ownership is transferred, how investments are accessed, and how global capital flows between markets. Rather than creating new assets, it enables existing assets to become more accessible, more liquid, and easier to participate in through blockchain technology.

Episode 16 explores how this evolution may impact the future of investing and why infrastructure—not just assets—will play a defining role in the next generation of financial markets.

Watch now and discover how tokenization is transforming ownership, investment, and the future of global finance. Welcome to Episode 16 of the RIFT Before You Quit series.

videos.title: Hindi - 01.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 01.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure.

videos.title: Avalanche Fill Out Roster Early In Day 1 Of Free Agency And Sign Jaden Schwartz
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Fill Out Roster Early In Day 1 Of Free Agency And Sign Jaden Schwartz Colorado Avalanche reload with Jaden Schwartz and Noah Juulsen as NHL free agency frenzy shakes up the league. Are the Avs’ offseason moves enough to keep them among Stanley Cup contenders, or is this roster now too top-heavy?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down Schwartz’s fit, Juulsen’s physicality, and Joe Sakic’s strategy for balancing veteran reliability with young talent like Gavin Brindley. Key NHL signings—including Bo Byram’s blockbuster deal with the Chicago Blackhawks, Toronto Maple Leafs’ aggressive overhaul, and surprising moves by the San Jose Sharks and Washington Capitals—spark debate on the best and worst contracts of the day. Does Colorado’s depth measure up to last year’s squad, and can the youngsters step up to fill crucial roles?

Get sharp analysis on how the Avalanche and their rivals reshaped the Western Conference during a wild free agency kickoff.

videos.title: Your New Go-To Shot Under Pressure  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Your New Go-To Shot Under Pressure  #golfswing #golftips When the pressure’s on, finding the fairway is all about control. This 3-step routine — narrow stance, limit the wrists, and swing at 50% — will help you hit it straighter, smoother, and keep the ball in play. The swing may feel slower, but you’ll get a more consistent, low-flight shot that finds the fairway. Practice this approach and make it your go-to under pressure. 
Follow for more helpful golf tips from Me and My Golf When the pressure’s on, finding the fairway is all about control. videos.title: Using Rotational Force Like Jesper Bratt
videos.summary_source_text:
Using Rotational Force Like Jesper Bratt The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Top Coaches BEST Drills for Every Part of Your Game
videos.summary_source_text:
Top Coaches BEST Drills for Every Part of Your Game Most golfers don't have a practice problem.  They have a practice structure problem.  These drills are going to help you start hitting better golf shots! 

This episode is sponsored by SoftSpikes.  Every golfer should be using spikes.  Get your fresh set here today. https://bit.ly/softspikes

In this video, PGA Coach Jackson Koert walks us through the essential drills he uses with everyone from everyday golfers to elite players. Instead of mindlessly hitting balls, you'll learn exactly what to practice with your:

🏌️ Driver
🏌️ Irons
🏌️ Wedges
🏌️ Chipping
🏌️ Putting

These aren't complicated drills. They're simple practice stations that improve your setup, contact, shot shape, and consistency so every range session actually transfers to the golf course. Jackson emphasizes that how you practice is just as important as what you practice, with a focus on creating repeatable setups and skill-building rather than just hitting balls.

In this video, you'll learn:

-The Tiger Driver Drill for making swing changes stick
-How to practice draws and fades with the rope drill
-A wedge drill almost nobody teaches
-The chipping station that builds three different trajectories
-Putting drills that improve aim and start line
-How to structure a productive practice session
-Why most golfers accidentally reinforce bad habits

Whether you're trying to break 100, 90, 80, or simply get more out of your practice time—these are drills you can take to the range today.

⛳ Let us know in the comments:
Which drill are you trying first?

If you enjoy videos like this, make sure to subscribe for new golf instruction every week.

videos.title: NHL Free Agency: Florida Panthers GM Bill Zito Talks Signings, Trades, Sergei Bobrovsky
videos.summary_source_text:
NHL Free Agency: Florida Panthers GM Bill Zito Talks Signings, Trades, Sergei Bobrovsky New Florida Panthers GM Bill Zito meets the media on NHL Free Agency day in Fort Lauderdale on Wednesday, July 1, 2026.

Zito addressed Florida’s signings, their trades — and moving on from two-time Stanley Cup champion goalie Sergei Bobrovsky. 

In the past few days, the Panthers traded for a new goalie tandem in Jacob Markstrom and Akira Schmid, signed Radko Gudas, Eetu Luostarinen, and Sandis Vilmanis to extensions. 

Florida also signed Lars Eller and Alex Petrovic as free agents. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.summary_source_text:

Hischier is tied for the 2nd-most OT winners in Devils history with 9 - take a look back at some of his best overtime game-winning goals as Captain Clutch dons the red and black for the foreseeable future!

videos.title: Inside TaylorMade's Exclusive Golf Facility
videos.summary_source_text:
Inside TaylorMade's Exclusive Golf Facility Rick gets exclusive access to  'The Kingdom' at The Grove, TaylorMade's brand-new, state-of-the-art fitting and performance centre. Join us for a full behind-the-scenes tour of one of the most advanced golf facilities in the world, before Rick puts it to the test with a custom fitting at the end. Could this be every golfer's dream destination?

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: THE FRUIT THAT HELPS KEEP ARTERIES CLEAR | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
THE FRUIT THAT HELPS KEEP ARTERIES CLEAR | Dr. Mandell Millions rely on aspirin to protect their heart — but what if a fruit could do something similar, naturally? In this video, I reveal the science behind kiwi and its powerful effect on blood flow, platelet aggregation, triglycerides, and inflammation. Backed by real research, kiwi has been shown to mimic some of aspirin’s effects — without the side effects. If you're concerned about heart health, clogged arteries, or blood pressure, you need to know about this natural solution. Your body has the ability to heal — and it might start with what’s on your plate.

🧪 Research Studies Referenced:
“Kiwi fruit consumption reduces platelet aggregation and plasma lipids in healthy human volunteers”
Journal: Platelets (2004)

“Effects of kiwifruit consumption on platelet aggregation and plasma lipids in healthy individuals”
Journal: Thrombosis Research (2004)
(Often cited alongside the Platelets journal version)

“Kiwifruit modulates lipid peroxidation and antioxidant status in humans”
Journal: Nutrition Research (2005)

“Kiwifruit improves bowel function and reduces the sensation of bloating in adults with constipation”
Journal: Asia Pacific Journal of Clinical Nutrition (2010)
(Supports digestive enzyme/actinidin reference)

“Consumption of green and gold kiwifruit affects biomarkers of antioxidant status and DNA repair in human volunteers”
Journal: The American Journal of Clinical Nutrition (2011)

“Dietary supplementation with kiwifruit reduces platelet hyperactivity and inflammation”
University of Oslo (Referenced in multiple cardiovascular-focused kiwi studies, around 2003–2005)

“Cardiovascular disease and C-reactive protein: Clinical update”
Journal: American Journal of Medicine (2003)
(Used in context of CRP reduction and inflammation)

***************************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: The Most Overlooked Fault in Golf #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
The Most Overlooked Fault in Golf #golfswing #golftips Most golfers blame their swing when they hit a bad shot when their real issue is contact. Where you strike the ball on the face has a massive effect on direction, spin, and distance. By simply spraying your club face, you can see exactly where you’re making contact — heel, toe, or center. Once you know your pattern, you can start fixing your swing with real feedback, not guesswork.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Most golfers blame their swing when they hit a bad shot when their real issue is contact. GLM-5.2: The Complete Guide to the Best Open-Source Model Z.ai's GLM-5.2 is a 1 million token, MIT-licensed open weight model that costs a fraction of frontier AI prices, and I put it through real tests to show you exactly where it holds up and where it doesn't. Also join my newsletter: https://futuretools.io/newsletter

I cover the three ways to actually use it (hosted web app, API and agent harness, or self-hosted if you have the infrastructure), build a webpage with it live, run it inside Cursor to create self-improving automation skills from my own meeting notes, generate a Remotion animation comparing GLM-5.2 against Opus 4.6, GPT-5.5, and Gemini 3.5, and show you a tool from Inference.net that lets you mirror production traffic to GLM-5.2 risk-free before fully committing.

If your workflows are long, code-heavy, document-heavy, or burning through tokens faster than you'd like, this model is worth serious attention. It's not beating Claude or GPT across the board, but for the right use cases the cost difference alone changes the math.

videos.title: Claude Fable 5 & Mythos 5 Are Back: Inside Anthropic's 19-Day AI Shutdown
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Fable 5 & Mythos 5 Are Back: Inside Anthropic's 19-Day AI Shutdown Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 are back online as of today — but the 19-day export-control shutdown that took them offline is the bigger story here, and almost nobody covered it that way.

I go through what Fable 5, Mythos 5, Opus 4.8, and the brand-new Sonnet 5 actually do, then walk through the three weeks that connect all four: a government export directive that pulled a deployed consumer AI product offline worldwide with hours of notice, a messy international fallout, and a selective, partner-gated comeback that's still not fully resolved even now that Fable 5 is publicly available again.

Chapters
00:00 The Launch Nobody Was Ready For
04:07 Three Days Later, Washington Stepped In
06:31 The Slow, Selective Comeback
08:18 Sonnet 5 Arrives, Untouched by Any of This
10:48 Putting It All Together
13:03 Where This Leaves You

If you're deciding which Claude model is actually worth building on right now, this breaks down the real trade-offs — not just the marketing numbers.

Subscribe for the next update if Mythos 5's wider rollout or Fable 5's classifier changes shift again — this clearly isn't fully settled yet.

videos.title: Fix Hip Sway in Your Driver Swing
videos.summary_source_text: Fix Hip Sway in Your Driver Swing Click link in bio for lowest price on the Ball First Board. If your hips shoot to the right in the backswing, the real fix starts with your upper body and sternum—not trying to “stay left.” I show you how to practice a subtle 1–2 inch upper-body shift to the right as you load into the backswing so your hips can move correctly, avoid crashing into the stick, and then use that momentum to get back to your lead side. The feel is simple: bump, turn, bump, turn. You can drill this at home to get a steadier swing with fewer moving parts and hit your driver more solid and straight. videos.title: Claude Sonnet 5 Explained: 1M Context, $2/M Tokens & the Tokenizer Catch
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Sonnet 5 Explained: 1M Context, $2/M Tokens & the Tokenizer Catch Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Anthropic just made Claude Sonnet 5 the default model for everyone on Free and Pro — no popup, no email. So instead of taking the launch post at face value, I went through the system card, the pricing page, and the platform docs line by line. The benchmark gains are real. But there's a footnote about the tokenizer that quietly changes what "cheaper" means once the introductory pricing window closes in September.

In this video: where Sonnet 5 lands next to Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.8, which benchmarks hold up and which need context, what the new effort parameter changes about how you prompt this model, and what Anthropic's own safety testing admits it still can't do as well as Opus 4.8.

videos.title: Lower your heart rate with walking? #hearthealth #walking
videos.summary_source_text:
Lower your heart rate with walking? #hearthealth #walking You can likely lower your resting heart rate by around 10% in the next month with structured walking. 

In my Five for Life program, we use a simple method called ABC Walking. It’s a periodized walking program that’s low impact, easy to follow, and designed to improve cardiovascular fitness without beating up your joints.

Instead of trying to walk faster, especially if you have knee or lower back pain, we increase the challenge by going uphill or climbing stairs.

Just 30 minutes a day. 150 minutes a week.

It’s realistic, sustainable, and one of the simplest ways to improve your heart health.

The Homey Podcast #15 • De Groene Nerds • Turn Your Smart Home Into an Energy Management System Danny Oosterveer from @degroenenerds joins Abe to dig into how a smart home becomes a full energy management system (EMS). They cover solar production, EV charging automation, dynamic energy pricing, and the automations that turn all of that into real savings on energy and money.

Danny co-hosts the Dutch podcast De Groene Nerds, where he covers sustainable living and smart energy for more than 25,000 engaged listeners. He’s also appeared on Dutch national news to explain dynamic energy pricing, the same topic he and Abe dig deeper into here.

videos.title: Why Your Body Feels Tense Even When You’re Resting
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Your Body Feels Tense Even When You’re Resting Do you feel tense even when you’re resting?
Many people feel like their body is always “on” — the jaw is tight, the shoulders are lifted, the belly is held, or the body feels guarded even when nothing intense is happening.
This may not mean your body is broken. It may mean bracing has become familiar.

In this video, I explain how bracing can become your normal, why your body may be working harder than you realize, and how sensing support can begin to change your relationship with tension.

You’ll also experience a short somatic exploration to notice where your body may be holding more than necessary.

If you’d like to explore this approach more deeply, try my free guided somatic movement session here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

If you feel ready for deeper, more structured support, you can learn more about my course here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

videos.title: The Truth About Anthropic's Valuation
videos.summary_source_text:
The Truth About Anthropic's Valuation The market seems to think Anthropic just won the AI war against OpenAI. But what's the real story?

Everyone is talking about Anthropic's massive $965B valuation filing compared to OpenAI's $852B. And if we look at the business fundamentals, Anthropic brought the receipts:
💰 $30B vs $25B in annualized revenue
🤝 70% win rate for massive enterprise clients
📈 Projected profitability by 2028 (OpenAI isn't expected until 2030)
🇻🇦 And the cherry on top: a acknowledgment on AI safety from the Pope himself

BUT... OpenAI is still the undefeated king of the consumer market with a staggering 905 MILLION weekly active users for ChatGPT. 

The real battle isn't just about valuation. It’s Enterprise Revenue vs. Consumer Growth. Claude is winning on precision and nuance, while ChatGPT is winning on convenience and brand dominance.

Which team are you on? Let me know in the comments!

videos.title: Rockies Show Life + Nuggets Offseason Heats Up With Jaylen Brown Rumors | After The Horn Ep 55
videos.summary_source_text:
Rockies Show Life + Nuggets Offseason Heats Up With Jaylen Brown Rumors | After The Horn Ep 55 Welcome back to Episode 55 of ‘After The Horn’ with Woody Paige, Tom Green, and Ron Zappolo! 

On this week’s episode, Woody, Ron, and Tom discuss the positive direction the Colorado Rockies are heading in. Despite a losing record and many struggles this season, their improvement is noticeable compared to last year. Whether it’s a stronger core within the roster or changes in management involving the Penner group, Rockies baseball is moving in an exciting direction. Catcher Hunter Goodman is heating up at the perfect time, and the Rockies are expected to be aggressive at the MLB trade deadline. However, there is still plenty of work to be done to make this a winning-caliber team.

Speaking of things heating up, the Denver Nuggets are expected to make a splash trade this offseason in an effort to rework their roster around Nikola Jokić. Despite flying under the radar since their first-round exit to the Timberwolves, names like Christian Braun, Cam Johnson, and even Jamal Murray have been mentioned as possible trade assets in a big move. The Nuggets have been connected in multiple reports to Boston’s Jaylen Brown, and it may only be a matter of time before a major deal materializes. Is it worth it for Denver to pursue another star player? And more importantly, why is Nikola Jokić delaying his extension with the Nuggets? With several players up for new contracts and questions surrounding whether this core can still win a championship, there is plenty to discuss in Denver.

The Avalanche also have key priorities to watch this summer, with Cale Makar eligible for an extension on July 1st and more moves expected from Joe Sakic. The Broncos are continuing their offseason work as Bo Nix prepares to enter year three.

From Nuggets speculation to the Rockies’ upward trajectory, the crew covers it all on this week’s episode of ‘After The Horn’ on Guerilla Sports.

Powered by: Redbird Farms | redbirdfarms.com

Created by Skip Weller and Woody Paige

What happens when 100 years of golf experience sits down to share the lessons that matter most? In this special conversation, Coach Ed Schwent and former PGA Tour player Jay Delsing combine over a century of playing, teaching, and competing at the highest level to reveal the fundamentals that actually lower scores.

You'll learn why setup is the foundation of every great swing, how shoulder alignment and ball position create (or eliminate) slices, why knowing your true carry distances is one of golf's biggest hidden advantages, and how the correct distance from the ball can transform your consistency. Jay also shares stories from playing over 500 PGA Tour events, comparing legends like Greg Norman, Seve Ballesteros, and modern stars like Scottie Scheffler, while explaining how equipment has changed the game.

Ed and Jay also dive into launch monitor myths, club path vs. clubface, keeping the club in front of your body, controlling low point, and why the golf ball always tells the truth. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced golfer, these timeless fundamentals will help you build a more reliable swing and play your best golf.

videos.title: How to Drop Your Blood Pressure Within MINUTES (& It’s Free)
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Drop Your Blood Pressure Within MINUTES (& It’s Free) Find out how to lower your blood pressure instantly with a simple technique that’s absolutely free. Learn how simple techniques can support healthy blood pressure levels, what causes hypertension, plus several tips to lower blood pressure naturally. 

0:00 How to lower blood pressure fast
0:38 The vagus nerve and hypertension
1:18 Second technique to lower blood pressure 
1:46 What causes hypertension?
3:44 Essential hypertension
4:25 Insulin, sodium, and high blood pressure
5:44 What causes insulin levels to increase? 
8:56 How to lower blood pressure naturally
12:33 Can hypertension be reversed? 

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/3SEseo3

Explore more ways to support healthy blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health naturally:
▶️ https://youtu.be/i_hRFpWIUyI
▶️ https://youtu.be/Qgwu_-6wy40
▶️ https://youtu.be/2qu59nPJXcg

Learn how to make hibiscus tea to support healthy blood pressure levels here: https://drbrg.co/3QSofDQ

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

One simple breathing technique can help lower blood pressure levels in just a few minutes. Try breathing in for 4 seconds and out for 6 seconds, then use a blood pressure monitor to compare your blood pressure before and after.

This technique works by stimulating the vagus nerve, which influences the heart and parasympathetic nervous system. Focusing on a longer exhale can also help promote relaxation during periods of stress or anxiety. Sunlight exposure also provides additional support for healthy blood pressure by stimulating the production of nitric oxide, which helps relax blood vessels.

High blood pressure often develops long before you’re diagnosed with hypertension. In fact, changes in arterial stiffness can occur years earlier. A pulse wave velocity test can help assess arterial stiffness before high blood pressure develops.

Nearly 90% of hypertension cases are classified as essential hypertension, meaning the exact cause is unknown. Lifestyle factors are rarely studied in healthcare research.

Arterial stiffness is often preceded by high levels of insulin, which cause sodium retention. Refined sugar consumption, chronic stress, and low magnesium are a few factors that trigger high insulin levels.

videos.title: Best SUVs for £2,000: Toyota v Mercedes v Land Rover
videos.summary_source_text:
Best SUVs for £2,000: Toyota v Mercedes v Land Rover We’re reviewing second-hand SUVs that are worth up to £2,000 - a Toyota Land Cruiser, a Mercedes ML & a Land Rover Discovery, and we’re going to put them through a series of tests to see which is the best value-for-money.

Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://www.carvertical.com/carwow

If you’re in the market for a large yet cheap second-hand SUV, which is the better pick - a Toyota Land Cruiser, a Mercedes ML, or a Land Rover Discovery 3? 

Well, with a budget of just £2,000, we’ve got our hands on one of each to see which is the best. Mat and the team are going to go head-to-head in a drag race, compare their exteriors and interiors, and see what they’re like to drive on the road. 

But which will come out on top? Let’s take a closer look…

Starting with the Discovery 3, it’s powered by a 2.7-litre V6 that produces 190hp and 440Nm. It’s equipped with a 6-speed manual and weighs 2,419kg. It was first released in 2005, we bought it for £1,500, and it currently has 256,000 miles on the clock. 

Up next is the Mercedes ML. There’s a 2.7-litre inline-5 turbo diesel under the bonnet, and this produces 163hp and 400Nm. It’s equipped with a 5-speed automatic gearbox, weighs around 2,100kg, and was released in 2005. We bought it for £1,800, and it has 140,000 miles on the clock. 

Finally, we come to the Land Cruiser. It’s powered by a 4.7-litre V8, and this puts down 235hp and 434Nm. It rolls up with a 4-speed automatic gearbox, and it weighs 2,260kg. It was originally released in 2002, and although it was originally bought for £5,000, it’s only worth around £2,000 now. To date, it’s run around 282,000 miles. 

So which of these is the best buy? Stick with Mat to see for yourself! We’re reviewing second-hand SUVs that are worth up to £2,000 - a Toyota Land Cruiser, a Mercedes ML & a Land Rover Discovery, and we’re going to put them through a series of tests to see which is the best value-for-money.

videos.title: Unboxing IFRS 18 – Riskhantering
videos.summary_source_text:
Unboxing IFRS 18 – Riskhantering Hur påverkas bolagens riskhantering av en standard som handlar om presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter? I praktiken visar det sig att kopplingen är tydligare än många förväntat sig.

IFRS 18 ändrar inte riskerna i sig, men standarden förändrar hur risker synliggörs och kommuniceras i resultaträkningen. Med nya kategorier och tydligare principer för klassificering försvinner det traditionella finansnettot – och derivat som tidigare samlades där behöver nu hänföras till den kategori där den underliggande risken hör hemma. Det innebär att till exempel valutaterminer, elderivat och ränteswappar alla kan hamna i olika delar av resultaträkningen.

Grundregeln låter enkel – men i praktiken uppstår snabbt frågor: Vad händer när ett derivat säkrar en nettoexponering som spänner över flera kategorier? Hur hanterar man derivat som säkrar en risk som egentligen hör hemma i en annan kategori än där man intuitivt skulle placera dem? Och finns det skäl att i större utsträckning tillämpa säkringsredovisning enligt IFRS 9 för att undvika oönskad volatilitet i rörelsen?

I det här avsnittet djupdyker vi i just dessa frågor tillsammans med Anna Lööw och Filip Wedlin, redovisningsspecialister på PwC. Tillsammans med moderator Mian Heldesten, går vi igenom hur de nya klassificeringsprinciperna fungerar, vad som skiljer ekonomisk säkring från säkringsredovisning i det nya landskapet och vilka praktiska steg bolag bör ta redan nu.

Detta är det tredje avsnittet i vår LinkedIn Live-serie Unboxing IFRS 18, där vi löpande gör kortare nedslag i den nya standarden tillsammans med olika gäster som delar sina perspektiv och praktiska erfarenheter. IFRS 18 Presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter ersätter IAS 1 Utformning av finansiella rapporter och ska tillämpas för räkenskapsår som börjar 1 januari 2027 eller senare, inklusive jämförelseinformation. Det innebär att vi redan nu befinner oss i jämförelseperioden som ska inkluderas i kvartalsrapporter och årsredovisning avseende 2027. Oavsett om du just börjat bekanta dig med standarden eller är mitt i implementeringen får du med dig värdefulla insikter och konkreta takeaways.

Se även:
Del 1: Unboxing IFRS 18 – En introduktion https://youtu.be/zcyRGyFW_To
Del 2: Unboxing IFRS 18 – Valutakursdifferenser https://youtu.be/11el9OfEZY0

Besök gärna vår webbplats: https://www.pwc.se/ Hur påverkas bolagens riskhantering av en standard som handlar om presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter? I praktiken visar det sig att kopplingen är tydligare än många förväntat sig.

Det innebär att till exempel valutaterminer, elderivat och ränteswappar alla kan hamna i olika delar av resultaträkningen.

Och finns det skäl att i större utsträckning tillämpa säkringsredovisning enligt IFRS 9 för att undvika oönskad volatilitet i rörelsen?

I det här avsnittet djupdyker vi i just dessa frågor tillsammans med Anna Lööw och Filip Wedlin, redovisningsspecialister på PwC. Tillsammans med moderator Mian Heldesten, går vi igenom hur de nya klassificeringsprinciperna fungerar, vad som skiljer ekonomisk säkring från säkringsredovisning i det nya landskapet och vilka praktiska steg bolag bör ta redan nu.

Detta är det tredje avsnittet i vår LinkedIn Live-serie Unboxing IFRS 18, där vi löpande gör kortare nedslag i den nya standarden tillsammans med olika gäster som delar sina perspektiv och praktiska erfarenheter. IFRS 18 Presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter ersätter IAS 1 Utformning av finansiella rapporter och ska tillämpas för räkenskapsår som börjar 1 januari 2027 eller senare, inklusive jämförelseinformation. Det innebär att vi redan nu befinner oss i jämförelseperioden som ska inkluderas i kvartalsrapporter och årsredovisning avseende 2027. Oavsett om du just börjat bekanta dig med standarden eller är mitt i implementeringen får du med dig värdefulla insikter och konkreta takeaways.

Se även:
Del 1: Unboxing IFRS 18 – En introduktion https://youtu.be/zcyRGyFW_To
Del 2: Unboxing IFRS 18 – Valutakursdifferenser https://youtu.be/11el9OfEZY0

Besök gärna vår webbplats: https://www.pwc.se/
videos.summary: Unboxing IFRS 18 – Riskhantering Hur påverkas bolagens riskhantering av en standard som handlar om presentation och upplysningar i finansiella rapporter. I praktiken visar det sig att kopplingen är tydligare än många förväntat sig.

FREE AGENT FRENZY! Who are Possible Targets for the Carolina Hurricanes in Free Agency? It's officially here, the beginning of free agency as we start gearing up for the 2026-27 season. After acquiring K'Andre Miller on July 1, 2025, and Nikolaj Ehlers a couple of days later, what do the Carolina Hurricanes have in store this time around? Will they sign any free agents? Will they extend anyone? Who could be the targets for Eric Tulsky and the front office? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on Alexander Nikishin being a possible option for the Hurricanes to extend, as he is a restricted free agent (RFA). They know what he can do. What could a possible deal look like? Also, could Mason Marchment be a possible option for the Hurricanes, since he's an unrestricted free agent (UFA)? Does it make sense to bring him onto the roster? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on some possible RFAs the Hurricanes could offer sheet. Does Jason Robertson make sense for an offer sheet, or is someone else in play? Finally, Zach concludes the show by looking at some possible extensions the Hurricanes could make as well. Do Jalen Chatfield, Shayne Gostisbehere, Jordan Martinook, and Jordan Staal make sense for extensions? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes

The BEST new Driver for under £300 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

videos.title: Våga använda den magiska cirkeln på banan.
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
Våga använda den magiska cirkeln på banan. Att förstå varför vi tränar den magiska cirkeln och hur det påverkar slagen är nyckeln till att våga använda rörelsen på banan. 

#golf #golftips #golfswing 

0:00 Intro till lär dig den magiska cirkeln från grunden. 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook. Att förstå varför vi tränar den magiska cirkeln och hur det påverkar slagen är nyckeln till att våga använda rörelsen på banan. 

#golf #golftips #golfswing 

0:00 Intro till lär dig den magiska cirkeln från grunden. 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du fightas med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook.

videos.title: How to make the circle of speed work on the golf course…
videos.channel: Better & Easier golf with your guide Marcus Edblad
videos.summary_source_text:
How to make the circle of speed work on the golf course… If we remember why we do the circle of speed and that spinn will always win we can learn to trust it on the golf course. 

#golfswing #golf #golftips 

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

0:00 Intro to how to understand and learn the circle of speed

Let me help you get an effortless golfswing with speed, distance and accuracy. I call it the circle of speed. A good release will help you to a better impact and longer drives and irons without slice and hook. How to swing a golf club need to be adjusted to your skill level and experience. 

Long and straight is the goal for everyone but it takes time. Try to focus on one thing not everything when you practise. Impact, face control and swingpath will always be the most important part to drill. We focus too much on rotation but no good golf shot will be executed just by rotating. 

We also need to understand that many myths in golf are misleading. Everything that you find on the internet isn’t true. Ben Hogan, Sam Snead are two of the legends that are often misunderstood.  To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out. 

A will never call a slice sexy but a high draw is beautiful in a very special way. Some pro's that hit draw: Rory McIroy, Xander Schauffele, Patrick Reed, Sepp Straka, Bryson Dechambeau  and many, many more. 

We shall not keep our head still, only start with the hips, look only at the ball or keep the left or right arm straight. Understand what do do with the club and let your body find the best way possible. 

This is not Rick Shiels, Saguto golf, Danny Maude, Meandmygolf, the Average Golfer, Malaska, Mark Crossfield, Alex Elliot Golf or Paige Spiranac. This is a method that anyone can learn if you give it a chance. 

If you use callaway, ping, titleist, takomo or taylor made clubs doesn’t matter you can learn to hit good golf shots. Your loft or your shaft on the club will not change but you can always get better. 

Find what inspires you. Golf basics are the same for everyone. The pga tour, longdrivers or other good golfers can all help you find better golf shots. Watch what they do instead of listed to what they say. Listen mostly to your body and figure out what you need to do to produce the same results as the pros on TV. Be careful when you watch a golf swing in slow motion. The result isn't always what the golfer is trying to do. Feel and real are seldom the same. 

We can find inspiration in a lot of things. You can find training motivation watching movies like Rocky, Tin Cup or Happy Gilmore and find mental inspiration in legends like Arnold Schwarzenegger, Hulk Hogan, Sylvester Stallone or Mike Tyson. Maybe we sometimes need to hear about crazy achievements from people like David Goggins, Jocko Willink, Ct Fletcher, Jim Rohn or Tony Robbins. 

Mike Malaska, Mike Austin, Mike Dunaway, Pete Cowen and Steve Pratt are some of my favorite golf instructors online. Find the tips that make your golf better. Decide what you want to hit. I teach a draw but many like a fade and nobody likes a hook or slice. 

Your hips or your lag is not the key to golf. Your hands will decide the shot and you can do like Tiger Woods and trust your hands. Teach your hands to hit different shots. Hit big hooks and slices to understand what happens. Only straight is not gonna teach you anything. 

Bryson Dechambeu and Kyle Birkshire can inspire you to hit it longer. Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson can give you inspiration and motivation to test new things and new golf shots. Linn Grant, Viktor Hovland and Ludvig Aberg can show you the future of golf. 

The Masters, Players Championship, The Players, The Open and US Open can make you love golf even more. See the best in the world solve all the problems we all need to master any golf course. Golf is a craft and you need fantasy, feel and skills to master it.

Questions my videos will answer:

How to swing faster. How to hit longer. How to swing faster. How to hit your irons better. How to be better at anything. How to master the circle of speed. How to get a better short game. How to hit your wedge better. How to release the golf club. How to rotate in golf. Best tips for beginner golfers. How to hit down on the ball. How to hit up on the ball. How to rotate hips in the golf swing. How to hit straight every time. How to stop slicing. How to swing effortlessly. 

#subscribe #golftips #pga  #hurricane 


Filmed with Iphone 15 pro or Iphone 17 If we remember why we do the circle of speed and that spinn will always win we can learn to trust it on the golf course. 

#golfswing #golf #golftips 

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

videos.title: 30.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
30.06.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. Predicting the Potentially Record Breaking Extension For Cale Makar. Free Agency Day 1 Expectations. On Wednesday, the Colorado Avalanche can officially sign Cale Makar to a contract extension. Many believe it will be a mammoth contract, others think Cale will extend the Avalanche an olive branch and take a team friendly deal. We throw out our predictions on what the contract for the best defenseman in the league will look like.

We also discuss what we think day one of free agency will look like, and award now former Avalanche Val Nichushkin his season grade.

Tune in and enjoy!

Whether it's through breathwork, yoga, tai chi, or another practice, intentionally slowing the breath can activate the vagus nerve and help the body return to a healthier state. The goal isn't to find the ideal practice, it's to make practicing it part of your life.

videos.title: How To Manipulate The Goalie From The Blue Line
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Manipulate The Goalie From The Blue Line The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.summary_source_text:
+4 Handicap Golfer In For A Live Fitting On The Tiger Woods Irons at The Trott Shop +4 Handicap Golfer in for a LIVE FITTING on the Tiger Woods Iron at The Trott Shop

This is a #tourtrucktuesday LIVE FITTING treat as Rob Perea visits The Trott Shop for a full bag fitting. 

The P7TW Tiger Woods Iron goes in and we look at matching his set into the woods. This is a fitting with a twist too as the iron shaft choice might not be what you’d expect.

If you’re interested in taking your game to the next level and this type of service is all you then go to www.thetrott.shop to reserve your spot.

Come and see for yourself, The Trott Shop at La Valle Coastal Club. We offer the Tour fitting and build experience directly to golfers seeking the best.

Learn more: https://thetrott.shop

Book a Tour Fitting Experience: https://thetrott.shop/pages/bookings

Whether you need a full bag fitting, driver upgrade, or custom club build, we’ve got you covered.

Our in-house coach, Skyler Finnell, is a Grass League professional, former PGA Tour Latin America player, and resident instructor.

Book a lesson with Skyler: https://thetrott.shop/pages/bookings

Stay connected by subscribing to the Trottie Golf newsletter for new content, equipment releases, Tour insights, and more at: https://pages.trottiegolf.com/tourtrucktuesday-sign-up-form

videos.title: The BEST Affordable Zero Torque Putter (NOT a Temu Fake)
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST Affordable Zero Torque Putter (NOT a Temu Fake) Zero torque putters have taken over golf over the last couple of years, but there's one big problem. Most premium options, like the LAB putters, cost $600+ and the market has since been flooded with cheap copies and fake zero torque putters from sites like Temu.

In this video, I test what could genuinely be one of the best budget zero torque putters I've ever used. I wasn't expecting much, but you can judge from my reaction whether this affordable option is actually the real deal or just another gimmick.

I'll compare the feel, forgiveness, roll, distance control and overall performance to see whether this putter can compete with the premium zero torque models without the premium price tag. If you're considering a LAB putter but don't want to spend over $600, this review could save you a lot of money.

videos.title: WTF is China building now 😂
videos.summary_source_text:
WTF is China building now 😂 The future is here, and it’s ready to take your crap 😂

This is a self driving toilet called Xiaoban made by Chinese company Yueban that just debuted at a Shanghai aged-care expo.

You just summon it to your bedside and it has a built-in bidet. When you’re done, it autonomously drives to your regular bathroom, dumps the waste into the toilet, scrubs its own bowl, and docks itself to recharge and refill.

Obviously this was made for folks with mobility issues, and it’s pretty cool that tech has come this far to be able to help people in this way! 

At the same time, I can’t help but imagine some people using this just for fun or out of laziness.

videos.title: Fix Your Inside Takeaway: Get On Plane
videos.summary_source_text: Fix Your Inside Takeaway: Get On Plane Click link in bio for lowest price on the SLR3. If your club keeps getting dragged to the inside and you want to stay perfectly on plane, I’ll show you the feel you need: the clubhead staying outside your hands in the takeaway. If you’ve been struggling with driver, comment “solid” and I’ll send you a free series of videos to help you hit it solid and straight. I also demonstrate my training aid, the SLR3 Bumblebee (SLR = shallow lag release), using its yellow band as a visual to keep the club outside the hands, then letting the band’s tension naturally shallow the club, create lag, and teach a full release to avoid casting and a chicken wing. Do five reps, stay passive, then hit balls and let the band do the work. Want your own SLR3 Bumblebee? Click the link in my bio. Click link in bio for lowest price on the SLR3. videos.title: You’re Shallowing the Club Too Late. Do This Instead
videos.summary_source_text:
You’re Shallowing the Club Too Late. Do This Instead ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=30.06.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=30.06.26

A lot of golfers are trying to shallow the golf club with their hands and arms, but the real problem often starts much earlier.

In this lesson, we look at why a good golfer was getting too steep in the downswing, even though he was actively trying to shallow the club. The issue was not simply the hands. It came from how his upper body and spine were positioned at the top of the backswing.

When the spine leans too much towards the target, the body can force the club to steepen early. From there, the golfer has to make a late compensation to shallow it out. 

Better players tend to do the opposite: they prepare the body better, shallow the club earlier, then rotate and apply speed later.

In this video, we’ll show you what most golfers get wrong, how the best players create the conditions to shallow the club, and what to look for in your own swing.
